suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether the tests-first rule is mandatory for narrow follow-up fixes that intentionally rely on existing coverage, and whether `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` may stay true in that case.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for `external-package-foundation-hooks` found the latest handoff reported `followedProcedure: true` while adding no tests and explicitly relying on existing suite coverage plus a manual `.rg -> .go` check, but `.factory/skills/compiler-worker/SKILL.md` still says workers should write tests first and mark `followedProcedure` false when deviating.
